[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustration shows a close-up of a dark-haired person with an orange hairpin-like ornament and a dark outfit, framed from the shoulders up.

Main Subject:
A person with long dark brown hair and side-swept bangs is shown in a close-up, facing slightly to the left while looking downward. Their eyes are bright with orange tones, and the eyelids are lowered in a focused, calm expression. A small star or flower-like ornament appears near one side of the head, and there is a short, slender facial marking on the cheek area. They wear a dark top with a high collar featuring an orange interior layer, and a dark choker-like band around the neck. A light-colored, decorative accessory resembling a bow or emblem sits at the front center of the collar area.

Setting:
The background is an indoor, corridor-like space with wooden paneling or planks running vertically and diagonally, plus structural framing along the sides. Warm lighting falls across the scene, suggesting an interior with soft sunlit or lamp-like illumination; the exact time of day is unclear.

Visual Details:
The composition is tightly cropped around the face and upper torso, with the head tilted slightly and the gaze directed to the left. Hair strands show smooth shading and highlights in warm brown tones. The outfit includes dark fabric with an orange section at the neck, and the decorative emblem and choker add contrast. Lighting is warm and directional from the right side of the image, creating bright highlights on the face and hair and deeper shadows along the left side.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image depicts a stylized, anime-like close-up portrait of a dark-haired person in a dark outfit with an orange collar and a light decorative emblem. The background shows a warm-lit wooden interior corridor or hallway.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
